subcodes.first_line: O Hasan, Lord of the hidden and the manifest! All who dwell upon the earth are, on this Day, summoned unto the straight Path of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسن مولی السر و العلن جمیع من علی الارض را الیوم بصراط مستقیم الهی دعوت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation
